# Test Campaign

A TTRPG campaign repo, scaffolded by the `ttrpg-gm` plugin.

## Campaign metadata

- **Name:** Test Campaign
- **System:** D&D 5e

## What lives here

This repo is the GM-owned home for one campaign. The GM is the user of this system; PCs are the player characters at the table; NPCs are any character voiced by the GM. The campaign holds one party, one ongoing run of sessions, and one campaign-local truth about the world.

For the current state of the campaign at a glance (active adventures, open threads, recent consequences, party location), see [`campaign.md`](./campaign.md). That file is agent-maintained — regenerated by `/wrap-session` and by `/ingest`. Don't hand-edit it as a primary workflow; the next regeneration will reconcile or overwrite.

## Available slash commands

- **`/ingest`** — scaffold and ingest existing notes.
- **`/prep-session`** — create a session directory and seed a Brief.
- **`/wrap-session`** — read in-play notes, draft a Log, propose lifecycle objects.

## Lifecycle objects (overview)

**Reference notes** — one file per item under `npcs/`, `locations/`, `factions/`, `items/`.

**Containers** — `adventures/<name>/` and `sessions/YYYY-MM-DD-session-N/`.

**Lifecycle objects** — `threads/` (open/closed/decayed), `consequences/` (persists), `beats/` (pending/delivered/dropped).

**Campaign overview** — `campaign.md` at the campaign root.

## Linking syntax

This campaign uses `[[wiki link]]` syntax.
